objective: Keep apex-core operationally coherent with explicit local governance context.
scope: Maintain the apex-core governance baseline as a self-contained public workspace.
acceptance_criteria: Governance context needed for routine apex-core operation is available locally

threat_model: Low risk because changes are limited to governance/context artifacts.
